title: Post-032 Toolchain Blocker And Publication Readiness Decision
objective: Consume Packet 032 evidence, decide whether the Packet 031 source artifact needs a bounded no-install workstation pnpm command availability/revalidation packet, rollback/defer handling, or a later publication gate, and stop without publication or runtime mutation.
active_role: Olares Packet 032 Publication Readiness Decision Operator
dependency_note: Packet 032 exactly mirrored the Packet 031 two-file source artifact and matched host/workstation diff hash `65882514ad1b609dcf5498ef23fbe18953e8f6e925e0170cb57c044809688f91`. Workstation `git diff --check` passed and app-local `tsc.cmd --noEmit` passed, but the canonical `pnpm --dir ... typecheck` and `pnpm --dir ... smoke:browser` commands were blocked because `pnpm` is absent from PATH, and app-local Playwright could not start the configured web server because it uses `pnpm exec next start`.
required_inputs: Current workstation status for the two mirrored source files and closure artifacts
Current host status for the Packet 031 artifact
No-install evidence about pnpm command availability and whether canonical validation can be re-run without package or lockfile mutation
constrained_outputs: A dated decision handoff stating whether publication remains blocked, whether a bounded no-install pnpm command availability/revalidation packet should open next, or whether rollback/defer handling is more truthful

No publication, host cleanup, source commit, host resync, package change, lockfile change, install work, runtime mutation, service mutation, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, AI-services rollout, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, migration approval, or old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Re-read Packet 032 evidence and confirm the mirrored two-file source artifact has not drifted before making a decision.
Inspect workstation command availability for pnpm using read-only checks only; do not install, activate, download, or mutate package manager state unless a later packet explicitly authorizes it.
Reconfirm host Packet 031 artifact state read-only and do not clean or publish it.
Decide the single next packet: bounded no-install pnpm command availability/revalidation, rollback/defer decision, or publication gate only if canonical validation is already proven.
Write the decision handoff and update routing or roadmap only as needed to preserve the exact next live packet.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no runtime, service, package, lockfile, install, publication, host-cleanup, remote, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, migration, or old-clone mutation. It is a decision packet only.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 033 reconfirmed the Packet 031 source artifact remains exact between host and workstation with diff SHA-256 `65882514ad1b609dcf5498ef23fbe18953e8f6e925e0170cb57c044809688f91`. Workstation `pnpm` is absent from the active PATH, but an existing user-level shim at `C:/Users/jjswe/AppData/Roaming/npm/pnpm.cmd` runs `pnpm@10.33.2`; the repo declares `pnpm@10.0.0` and Corepack last-known-good also names `10.0.0`. Canonical typecheck and browser smoke remain unproven, so publication is not eligible and rollback/defer is premature.
next_action: Open only Packet 034 for bounded no-install workstation pnpm path revalidation. Do not publish, install, activate or download package managers, mutate runtime or services, change packages or lockfiles, clean the host artifact, rewrite remotes, force, reset, clean, mutate the old clone, or approve migration from Packet 033.
